title: gouldia stipulacea
intro: Gouldia stipulacea is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, native to Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gouldia stipulacea include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight infections. It is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and may also be used in topical applications such as salves or creams.
